---
name: Framework Contribution
about: Contribute a new compliance framework or expand an existing one
title: "[Framework] Add/Expand: "
labels: framework, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 📋 Framework Details

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Framework Name | e.g. GDPR |
| Full Name | e.g. General Data Protection Regulation |
| Version | e.g. 2016/679 |
| Issuing Body | e.g. European Parliament |
| Published | e.g. May 25, 2018 |
| Region / Industry | e.g. EU / All industries |

## What Are You Contributing?

- [ ] New framework (not yet in the platform)
- [ ] Expanding an existing framework (adding more controls)
- [ ] Crosswalk mappings to an existing framework
- [ ] Updating outdated framework data

## Control Count

How many controls / requirements does this framework have?

- Total controls: e.g. 99 articles (simplified to ~45 actionable controls)
- Crosswalk mappings planned: e.g. GDPR → NIST CSF 2.0 (30 mappings)

## Source Reference

Where can reviewers verify the framework control content?

- Official source URL: 
- License / redistribution notes (is the content freely redistributable?): 

## Implementation Plan

Describe how you plan to implement this:
- [ ] SQL seed file in `db/seeds/`
- [ ] Backend framework seeding script
- [ ] Frontend framework page
- [ ] Crosswalk mappings
- [ ] Documentation update

## Related Issues / PRs

Link any related issues or PRs here.

## Additional Notes

Any other context, e.g., the complexity of the framework, known gaps, or areas where you need help.
